package rulecoverage

func NegativeRedisCommandLoopWithoutPipeline() string {
    ruleID := "redis_command_loop_without_pipeline"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Redis command loops that issue round-trips without pipeline or batch usage."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
